Index.title: Fullstack Web Developer | Garik Sukhanov
Index.description: Building modern, high-performance web and mobile applications. Specialized in React, Next.js, and Node.js with a strong focus on clean code and user experience.

coverLetter.title: About Me
coverLetter.content: Middle Full-Stack Developer with more than 4 years of experience. My projects include admin panels for large enterprises, CRM systems for sales departments, a service for managing map reviews, and a cross-platform application for agricultural machinery. My primary tech stack includes React, TypeScript, and TanStack Query. I also have experience in mobile development with React Native, backend development, as well as basic server administration and CI/CD setup.

items.description: Leading a team of 5 developers to build a high-traffic fintech platform. Optimized frontend performance by 40% and implemented a comprehensive CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions.
Developed over 15 custom web applications for international clients. Specialized in migrating legacy systems to modern React/Next.js stacks.
Collaborated on building an MVP for a SaaS platform. Focused on creating responsive UI components and integrating REST APIs.
